title: redis:7 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7.2.11-1.0.1]
- Build with 64k pages to support redis on UEK on aarch64

[7.2.11-1]
- rebase to 7.2.11 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819
full_text:
